items.title: Einhell 2270145 TE-MD 80 Digitális detektor
items.desc: Faldetektor Einhell 2270145 TE-MD 80 Digitális detektor:The Einhell TE-MD 80 digital cable detector is suitable for both DIYers and professional craftsmen who carry out interior or exterior construction work. The instru…
items.raw_desc: Faldetektor Einhell 2270145 TE-MD 80 Digitális detektor:The Einhell TE-MD 80 digital cable detector is suitable for both DIYers and professional craftsmen who carry out interior or exterior construction work. The instrument can reliably check whether there are ferrous or non-ferrous metals, wood or live wires in walls, ceilings or floors. The detection results are indicated by an acoustic signal together with an LCD display and a light indicator. If the light ring around the centering hole is green, there is no obstruction in the wall and the location can be marked as safe through the marking hole. In the case of orange, the detector approaches the object in the wall, while red indicates that the centering hole is directly above the detected object, for example a metal profile. The detector's operating mode can be set simply using the push-button control, and there is also an automatic calibration function to ensure maximum detection accuracy. The TE-MD 80 is powered by one 9V block battery (not included).                     Key features of the Einhell TE-MD...

Konzol játék Thomas and Friends: Wonders of Sodor: Deluxe Edition - PS5:
	
	


	 



	
		
	
	
	Nová vlaková dobrodružství
	Vydejte se na kouzelné dobrodružství na ostrově Sodor spolu s Tomášem a jeho přáteli. Usedněte do kabiny legendárních parních lokomotiv společnosti North Western Railway a zažijte příběhy, které si oblíbily generace fanoušků. Čekají vás nostalgické momenty i zcela nová vyprávění ve Thomas and Friends: Wonders of Sodor PS5.
	


	
		
	
	
	Prozkoumejte ostrov
	Prozkoumejte rozmanitá zákoutí ostrova Sodor a objevte jeho krásy z pohledu strojvedoucího. Každá cesta v Thomas and Friends: Wonders of Sodor PS5 přináší nové zážitky, setkání s oblíbenými postavami a úkoly, které prověří vaši šikovnost i pozornost. Atmosféra známého světa Tomáše vás doprovodí na každém kilometru trati.
	


	
		
	
	
	Poznejte další lokomotivy
	Thomas & Friends: Wonders of Sodor PS5 přináší dobrodružnou jízdu plnou přátelství, objevování a radosti z jízdy. Vydejte se na cestu, kde na vás čekají kouzelná místa, známé lokomotivy i nové příběhy, které rozšiřují svět ostrova...

items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Star Wars - Hoth ostroma:                Launch giant stepping robots in Star Wars - Hoth ostromaStar Wars - Hoth Ostroma, a themed version of the successful war game Memoir '44, lets players battle against each other in 17 exciting missions. Launch giant stepping robots to prevent the evacuation of the Rebel base or slow down the Empire's attack by mobilizing snowmobiles. 74 detailed minifigures complete the perfect experience. The game is designed for players who want to be transported to an iconic movie battle and experience it on their own table. The game is suitable for players aged 8 and over and you should allow approximately 30 minutes per game. Thanks to its easy-to-understand rules, even less experienced players can master it, but it still offers enough tactics to interest even strategy enthusiasts. Whether you're leading a ruthless Imperial army or taking command of heroic rebels, you'll face a thrilling conflict in which your orders, and a little bit of luck, are the deciding factor.                             8+

King Nebuchadnezzar II. decided to please his wife by building the most beautiful gardens full of fragrant flowers. The Queen would always be reminded of her homeland. The king therefore hired the most famous architects of his empire to help him realize the idea. Hot Gardens became one of the seven wonders of the ancient world.  In the game A csodák kertje you turn into architects. Get the best stones from the quarry, place them wisely and thus collect points. The player with the most points at the end of the game wins. The game excels in its simple principle and strategic depth.
